# Next Shield

> One-line security and authentication layer for Next.js applications with built-in CSRF and XSS protection

## Project Info
- Name: next-shield
- Author: TurkCode AI (https://turkcode.net)
- License: MIT
- Language: JavaScript / Node.js
- Category: nextjs-react
- Repository: https://github.com/turkcode-ai/next-shield

## Quick Start
```bash
npm install next-shield
```

```javascript
const nextShield = require('next-shield');
```

## Key Features
- nextjs
- security
- authentication
- csrf
- xss-protection
- middleware
- react
- typescript
- auth
- next-auth

## File Structure
- src/index.js - Main module with core functionality
- src/utils.js - Utility functions and helpers
- tests/index.test.js - Test suite
- docs/API.md - API reference documentation

## API Overview
This module exports its main functionality via `require('next-shield')`.
See docs/API.md for complete API reference.

## Related Resources
- Documentation: https://turkcode.net
- Blog: https://turkcode.net/blog
- Issues: https://github.com/turkcode-ai/next-shield/issues
